backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex grid trading bot with order placement/cancellation, configurable spread/interval/numOrders, activity logging, and recurring timer-based execution against the ICDex canister.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the ICDex ICP/ckUSDT Trading Bot React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app layout composing the Header, Footer, and a responsive dashboard grid of all panel components (BotControl, Configuration, MarketData, GridPreview, OpenOrders, TradeHistory, ActivityLog).
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: React component that fetches and displays paginated bot activity log entries with timestamp formatting, event-type color coding, loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
Bot control panel component showing running/stopped status, config summary (spread, numOrders, interval), and Start/Stop buttons with loading spinners and error handling.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: Renders a configuration form for bot settings (spread, grid orders, refresh interval) with validation, loading skeletons, and a save button that simulates saving (backend config is read-only).
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays a scrollable table of current grid price levels split into buy/sell sides, with a computed mid price, loading skeletons, error state, and a manual refresh button.
Shows the derived mid price (ICP/ckUSDT) from the latest grid data along with a live/idle/stale/error status badge and a refresh button, updating staleness every second.
Lists open orders sorted by side and price with buy/sell counts, and provides a 'Cancel All' button that triggers the cancel mutation with pending/success feedback.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: Displays a reverse-chronological trade history table with price, quantity, status (filled/cancelled/open), and relative timestamps, including loading skeletons and error/empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, and invalidates/refetches all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads using AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for interacting with the trading bot backend actor, including queries for bot status, config, open orders, trade history, and mutations for start/stop/cancel operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a terminal-style dark theme using Tailwind CSS with OKLCH color tokens for trading-specific semantics (buy/sell/running/stopped) and JetBrains Mono font.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, JetBrains Mono fonts, terminal-specific shadows/colors, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing pending feature requests to implement a `pending` backend method for open bot orders and update the frontend hook to call it instead of incorrect placeholder calls.
